name: Fluorescein
notes: Very bright green; pH-sensitive; good easy sanity check

name: Rhodamine 6G
notes: Very bright yellow-orange/red; excellent model sanity check

name: Coumarin 153
notes: Same molecule in nonpolar solvent; useful solvent-sensitivity test

name: Nile Red
notes: Strong solvent dependence; good red-region test

name: Perylene
notes: Very bright blue; good PAH sanity check

name: Pyrene
notes: Structured blue emission; may be concentration-sensitive

name: DAPI
notes: Blue dye; model may struggle if training lacks amidines/salts

name: Quinine
notes: Classic QY standard; condition is aqueous acid
